subject: GeneralKnowledge
title: GeneralKnowledge Test - 06
description: A mix of fun and educational questions covering animals, geography, science, community, and health for Grade 4 students.

questions.q: What is the primary function of the roots of a plant?
options: To absorb water and nutrients from the soil
To make the plant look pretty
questions.answer: To absorb water and nutrients from the soil
questions.explanation: Roots grow underground to anchor the plant and soak up water and minerals that the plant needs to grow.
questions.hint: They are the part of the plant hidden under the dirt.

questions.q: Which mountain is the highest in the world?
questions.explanation: Mount Everest is the highest mountain above sea level on Earth.
questions.hint: It is located in the Himalayas.

questions.q: Which of these is a social insect that lives in a colony?
questions.explanation: Ants are social insects that live in large, organized groups called colonies.
questions.hint: They are very small and often carry crumbs.
questions.objective: Identify common animals and their behaviors.

questions.q: What is the name of the force that pulls everything toward the center of the Earth?
questions.explanation: Gravity is the natural force that keeps us on the ground and causes things to fall.

questions.q: Which nutrient is essential for building strong muscles?
questions.explanation: Protein is a building block for bones, muscles, cartilage, skin, and blood.
questions.hint: Foods like eggs and beans are good sources of this.

questions.q: What do we call a person who helps others by volunteering their time?
questions.explanation: A volunteer is someone who works for free to help others or their community.
questions.hint: The word is almost the same as the definition.

questions.q: Which of the following is NOT a planet in our solar system?
questions.explanation: Pluto is classified as a 'dwarf planet,' not one of the eight major planets.
questions.hint: It used to be called a planet but was reclassified.
questions.objective: Understand basic facts about the solar system.

questions.q: What color do you get if you mix blue and yellow paint?
questions.explanation: When you mix blue and yellow together, you get green.
questions.hint: It is the color of grass.

questions.q: What is the primary language spoken in Brazil?
questions.explanation: Brazil is the only country in South America where Portuguese is the official language.
questions.hint: It is not Spanish, even though it is in South America.
questions.objective: Learn basic geography and language facts.

questions.q: Why is it important to wash your hands before eating?
options: To stop them from being dry
questions.explanation: Washing hands helps remove germs that can make you sick.
questions.hint: Think about what happens when you touch dirty surfaces.
